research_question: Do liquid, point-in-time eligible A-shares with the strongest positive 60- or 120-session total-return strength relative to 510300.SH earn positive cost-aware monthly excess returns, and does one fixed low-volatility eligibility filter improve robustness without parameter search?
null_hypothesis: For every frozen variant and gated split, the population mean monthly net active return versus the investable 510300.SH benchmark is less than or equal to zero.

external_review_basis.frozen_recommendation: RELATIVE_STRENGTH_MEDIUM_TERM_MOMENTUM with 60/120-session lookbacks, no more than one fixed volatility filter, CNY 400000, at most 15 positions, decision at D close and execution at D+1 open
external_review_basis.scope_constraint: No framework, provider, registry, strategy DSL, agent, or second backtest engine is created by this preregistration.

nearest_predecessors.name: FIP continuous winner
nearest_predecessors.mechanical_difference: Family 44 uses a 252-to-21 prior-return window, information-discreteness double sort, and six-month holding; this line uses simple 60/120-session benchmark-relative total return and monthly rebalancing.

nearest_predecessors.name: non-February 52-week high
nearest_predecessors.mechanical_difference: Family 46 ranks 252-session price-to-high and holds six overlapping vintages with a February exclusion; this line ranks 60/120-session relative total return with no calendar exclusion or overlapping vintage.

nearest_predecessors.name: breakout60 low-volatility volume event
nearest_predecessors.mechanical_difference: Family 66 requires a new 60-session high, a volume ratio, and a 15-session event horizon; this line has no breakout or volume condition and instead forms a monthly cross-sectional portfolio.

nearest_predecessors.name: A-share-listed multi-asset dual momentum
nearest_predecessors.mechanical_difference: Family 67 allocates across seven ETFs using 12-1 asset-class momentum and inverse volatility; this line ranks individual common shares over 60/120 sessions and equal-weights at most 15 names.

lineage_review.smallcap_trend_defense_note: The archived A_SHARE_SMALLCAP_SELECTOR_LINES is a rejected small-cap selector/regime-defense lineage; it is not reused and no small-cap or regime condition appears here.

corporate_action_event_schema.container: corporate_actions is an immutable array of atomic events; each event has exactly one action_type and exactly the payload allowed for that type

split.rule: ratio is finite, dimensionless, and strictly greater than one

reverse_split.rule: ratio is finite, dimensionless, strictly positive, and strictly less than one

cash_distribution.rule: cash_per_share_cny is finite and strictly positive CNY per pre-event share; dates are YYYY-MM-DD, no order is inferred between ex_date and record_date, both must be no later than pay_date, entitlement freezes on ex_date, and cash becomes available only on pay_date

terminal_cash_settlement.rule: terminal_recovery_cash_per_share_cny is finite and nonnegative CNY per old share; settlement_date is YYYY-MM-DD, is not earlier than the local date of effective_at, and cash becomes available only on settlement_date

successor_mapping.rule: successor_symbol is one canonical nonempty security identifier and successor_shares_per_old_share is a finite dimensionless ratio strictly greater than zero

corporate_action_event_schema.mutual_exclusion: Fields belonging to another action_type are forbidden, not null-filled. A mixed cash-and-stock event is represented by separate atomic action_ids with the same source identity and effective_at; payload mixing in one event fails closed.
corporate_action_event_schema.same_effective_at_grouping: For one subject and effective_at, snapshot old shares once, calculate every ratio and cash entitlement from that same pre-event share count, then replace/remove the old position once and schedule cash. At most one of split, reverse_split, or successor_mapping may appear in the group; conflicting share transforms fail closed. Cash_distribution or terminal_cash_settlement may coexist as separate action_ids only when the primary source explicitly defines the combined consideration.
corporate_action_event_schema.timestamp_and_date_rules: effective_at and available_at are timezone-aware instants. For split, reverse_split, cash_distribution, and successor_mapping, the local date of effective_at is the ex/effective session date; cash_distribution additionally requires all three frozen ex/record/pay dates.
corporate_action_event_schema.revision_rules: revision_id is unique within action_id; supersedes_revision_id is null only for the initial revision and otherwise names the immediately prior revision. Cycles, forks, missing predecessors, duplicate revision_ids, or more than one non-superseded revision available at a cutoff fail closed. Select only the unique terminal revision whose available_at is no later than the relevant cutoff.
corporate_action_event_schema.exact_once_rules: action_id is globally unique. Apply the selected revision for an action_id exactly once and persist the applied action_id; duplicate application fails. A later revision that changes already-applied economic terms is unsupported and fails closed unless the source publishes a separate corrective action_id with its own effective_at.
corporate_action_event_schema.unit_and_currency_rules: All cash values are normalized to CNY per share and carry implicit currency CNY; foreign currency, per-10-share, percent, aggregate-cash, or unknown units must be deterministically converted from explicit source units before acceptance or fail closed. Ratios are new shares per one old share and carry no currency. Missing, conflicting, nonfinite, or negative monetary values and nonpositive ratios fail closed, except terminal recovery may equal zero.

data_contract.total_return_identity: Construct a point-in-time total-return index from unadjusted closes plus accepted splits and cash distributions. Provider hindsight-adjusted qfq/hfq close is forbidden as primary evidence.

benchmark.role: fixed investable equity benchmark and relative-strength denominator

availability_cutoffs.signal_and_universe: Every bar, total-return factor, calendar row, security-status row, capacity observation, and effective corporate-action identity used at D must have immutable available_at no later than signal close_at plus 30 minutes.
availability_cutoffs.execution: The D+1 open, suspension flag, limits, calendar row, and any execution-effective action must be immutable and available no later than D+1 open_at.
availability_cutoffs.late_unknown_mutable_or_conflicting: fail closed; do not impute, carry backward, substitute a current status, or use a later revision

data_contract.duplicate_symbol_session_or_overlapping_: fail the run before any return calculation

universe.security_scope: SSE and SZSE listed domestic common A-shares only
universe.missing_rule: If any frozen decision has fewer than 500 base-eligible names, all four variant observations for that holding interval are invalid; no threshold relaxation or universe substitution is allowed.

signal.decision_frequency: last accepted SSE/SZSE session of each calendar month
signal.return_formula_for_L: TRI_stock[D] / TRI_stock[D-L] - 1 using exact accepted-session offsets
signal.benchmark_return_formula_for_L: TRI_510300[D] / TRI_510300[D-L] - 1 on the same accepted sessions
signal.volatility_20: sample standard deviation with ddof=1 of the 20 point-in-time close-to-close total returns ending at D
signal.volatility_filter: When enabled, retain names with volatility_20 less than or equal to the ordinary cross-sectional median over the complete base universe; for even N the median is the arithmetic mean of the two central sorted values.
signal.ranking: relative_strength descending, then symbol ascending; no tie expansion
signal.selection: first 15 ranked positive-relative-strength names after the variant filter
signal.common_benchmark_term_note: Subtracting or dividing by a common benchmark does not change the cross-sectional order; the benchmark-relative definition is frozen because the positive-excess eligibility threshold is economically operative.

portfolio_and_execution.target_weighting: equal notional weight across the 15 frozen ranked names before board-lot rounding
portfolio_and_execution.unallocated_cash: remain cash with zero return; no replacement name
portfolio_and_execution.entry_limit_up_or_suspension: no fill, no replacement, and the unfilled notional remains cash
portfolio_and_execution.exit_limit_down_or_suspension: retain and mark the holding using the latest accepted corporate-action-complete close; retry at each later accepted open until executable
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_exit_position_cap: A trapped holding continues to occupy one of 15 slots. New names are admitted in frozen relative-strength rank order only; the event-loop alphabetical fallback must never choose strategy membership.
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_exit_residual_weight: Off-target trapped holdings remain in NAV. Remaining admitted targets share only residual investable NAV after trapped-holding market value; no leverage or forced liquidation.
portfolio_and_execution.corporate_actions: Apply accepted splits, distributions, terminal cash settlements, and successor mappings exactly once. Missing terminal value or successor identity fails the run.

capacity.observation: immediately preceding accepted session only, available by decision_at
capacity.exceeded: order does not fill; no smaller adaptive order and no replacement

portfolio_and_execution.rebalance_schedule: monthly at D+1 open; sells before buys; holdings drift between rebalances
portfolio_and_execution.holding_interval: from one rebalance open immediately after execution and costs to the next scheduled rebalance open immediately before the next rebalance
portfolio_and_execution.nonfinite_accounting_or_missing_mark: fail the entire run before publication

costs.application: apply frozen slippage to every executed buy and sell price
costs.additional_engine_costs: V2 A-share commission rate 3 bps with CNY 5 minimum per order plus the dated statutory sell stamp-tax schedule; both are added to the 20/50 bps slippage scenarios
costs.benchmark_costs: same slippage, commission, board-lot, stamp-tax, and initial-entry convention as the strategy

benchmark_execution.portfolio: 100% 510300.SH buy-and-hold within each independently initialized split
benchmark_execution.initial_entry: first strategy execution open in that split
benchmark_execution.corporate_actions_and_missing_data: same PIT and fail-closed rules as strategy
benchmark_execution.monthly_return_alignment: exactly the same holding intervals retained for the corresponding strategy variant

splits.permitted_use: descriptive implementation diagnosis only; cannot select or alter a variant

splits.evidence_class: retrospective holdout; never described as prospective

splits.permitted_use: none; no return or diagnostic outcome may be opened

splits.evidence_class: only prospective strategy test in this preregistration

split_and_purge_rules.split_assignment: A monthly observation belongs to a split only when its execution entry and next scheduled rebalance exit are both inside that split's inclusive dates.
split_and_purge_rules.whole_label_purge: Purge every holding interval crossing a split boundary; never shorten, apportion, or assign by return date alone.
split_and_purge_rules.formation_history: Pre-split sessions may be used only to form the first in-split signal and may not contribute return observations.
split_and_purge_rules.independent_state: Each variant and split starts from CNY 400000 cash; no portfolio state or outcome crosses a split boundary.
split_and_purge_rules.embargo: No interval touching 2026-07-01 through 2026-12-31 may appear in another split.

metrics.monthly_strategy_return: end NAV divided by start NAV for each retained holding interval minus one, including executed costs and cash
metrics.monthly_active_return: strategy monthly arithmetic net return minus aligned benchmark monthly arithmetic net return
metrics.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation ddof=1 of monthly returns times sqrt(12)
metrics.maximum_drawdown: minimum daily close NAV divided by prior running peak NAV minus one, with wealth reset to one at split start
reported_diagnostics: mean active return and dependence-aware interval

inference_and_multiplicity.primary_tests: four variants times validation, retrospective holdout, and prospective forward: exactly 12 one-sided mean-active-return tests
inference_and_multiplicity.adjustment: fixed Bonferroni across all 12 tests; no alpha recycling
inference_and_multiplicity.resampling_unit: chronologically ordered non-overlapping monthly active returns
inference_and_multiplicity.seed_formula: 20260715 + 100 * variant_order + gated_split_order, where gated split order is validation=1, retrospective_holdout=2, prospective_forward=3
inference_and_multiplicity.null_centering: subtract the observed sample mean before resampling
inference_and_multiplicity.resampling: sample circular start positions uniformly with replacement, take three consecutive values with wrap, concatenate blocks, and truncate to N
inference_and_multiplicity.one_sided_p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / (10000 + 1)
inference_and_multiplicity.lower_bound: observed mean minus the linearly interpolated (1 - per_test_one_sided_alpha) quantile of centered bootstrap means
inference_and_multiplicity.missing_or_nonfinite_input: test and split fail; do not drop individual months after seeing returns

run_admissibility_and_reproducibility_al: definition, code, config, and accepted data-manifest hashes are exact
PIT calendar, status, total-return, benchmark, corporate-action, limit, suspension, and capacity identities are complete
all source available_at cutoffs and revision selections pass
duplicate, conflict, nonfinite, and accounting checks pass
every retained decision has at least 500 base-eligible and at least 15 ranked candidates
position cap, board lot, cash, T+1, blocked-exit, and capacity semantics pass
deterministic independent replay reproduces exact result bytes
per_variant_per_gated_split_all_required: mean monthly active return is positive
Bonferroni one-sided lower bound is positive
Bonferroni one-sided p-value is at or below 0.004166666666666667
strategy annualized net return exceeds benchmark annualized net return
no invalid decision, missing mark, unvalued terminal action, or post-cutoff input occurs
strict_gates.variant_historical_pass: the same variant passes every validation and retrospective-holdout gate; passing another variant cannot substitute
strict_gates.variant_strict_pass: the same variant passes validation, retrospective holdout, and prospective forward; historical evidence alone is never strict prospective evidence
strict_gates.family_pass: at least one frozen variant achieves variant_strict_pass under the fixed 12-test adjustment, without changing or suppressing any other variant
strict_gates.candidate_effect: none; even a family pass remains research evidence until a separate post-2029 review explicitly changes strategy_candidate_available

stop_and_failure_rules: Do not implement or execute until this exact JSON is independently accepted and bound by SHA-256.
Do not query any strategy, benchmark, split, variant, or security-level outcome before the code and accepted data manifest are frozen.
Any data-identity, PIT, chronology, revision, duplicate, nonfinite, accounting, or deterministic-replay failure stops the run without partial strategy evidence.

Do not change lookback, volatility threshold/window, benchmark, universe, liquidity floor, position count, ranking, rebalance schedule, cost, split, purge, inference, or gate after any outcome is opened.
Do not add volume confirmation, moving-average, RSI, MACD, breakout, regime, stop-loss, take-profit, industry, size, valuation, fundamental, or LLM-generated filters to this lineage.
Do not select one variant using development results; all four remain frozen and all gated tests remain in the lifetime multiplicity family.
A failed or blocked result closes this exact lineage under the observed evidence; reopening requires a genuinely new economic hypothesis and lineage ID, not parameter repair.
Do not reuse Family 44, 46, 66, 67 code, outcomes, test oracles, family numbers, or trial identities.
next_action: Independent read-only methodology acceptance of this JSON and sidecar only. If valid, separately implement the frozen contract with synthetic tests; real-data access remains blocked until a PIT data manifest is accepted.
